SEARCH

Uses of Package
neqsim.process.safety.overpressure

Packages that use neqsim.process.safety.overpressure
Package
Description
neqsim.process.safety.overpressure
 
  • Classes in neqsim.process.safety.overpressure used by neqsim.process.safety.overpressure
    Class
    Description
    AcceptanceResult
    Result of an overpressure accumulation acceptance check against the ASME VIII Div 1 / TR3001 section 2 accumulated-pressure limits.
    BlockedOutletRelief
    Calculates the relief load for a blocked-outlet contingency per TR3001 section 4.7.2 (SR-26460) and API STD 521 section 4.4.2.
    CheckValveLeakRelief
    Calculates the relief load from check-valve leakage per TR3001 section 4.7.3 (SR-26466) and API STD 521 section 4.4.9.3.
    ComplianceFinding
    Immutable record of a single TR3001 / API STD 521 compliance finding produced by TR3001ComplianceChecker.
    ComplianceStatus
    Outcome classification for a single TR3001 overpressure-protection compliance check.
    ControlValveFailureRelief
    Calculates the relief load from control-valve failure (fail-open) per TR3001 section 4.7.7 (SR-26501) and API STD 521 section 4.4.9.
    FireCaseRelief
    Calculates the vapour relief load from an external pool-fire exposure per TR3001 section 4.7.8 (SR-26504) and API STD 521 section 4.4.13 using the API 521 Table 4 wetted-surface heat-input correlation.
    OverpressureAcceptanceChecker
    Evaluates whether a peak (relieving) pressure is acceptable against the ASME VIII Div 1 / TR3001 section 2 maximum allowable accumulated-pressure limits.
    OverpressureProtectionStudy
    Aggregates the credible overpressure relief scenarios for a protected item, selects the governing (worst-case) scenario, sizes the pressure relief device for that case and checks the accumulated-pressure acceptance limit.
    OverpressureStudyResult
    Result of an OverpressureProtectionStudy evaluation for one protected item.
    ProtectedItem
    A pressure-containing item protected by an overpressure protection device, with the pressure and temperature design data required for TR3001 / API STD 521 relief evaluation.
    ReliefCause
    Credible overpressure causes recognised by Equinor TR3001 (Process safety) and API STD 521 6th edition section 4.4.
    ReliefDisposalNetwork
    Aggregates the governing relief loads of several protected items that discharge into a shared disposal system (flare or vent header), so that the total simultaneous load can be established for header and flare-tip sizing.
    ReliefDisposalResult
    Immutable result of a ReliefDisposalNetwork aggregation.
    ReliefFluidState
    Package-private immutable snapshot of the relieving-fluid properties evaluated at a given relief pressure and temperature.
    ReliefLoadContribution
    Immutable description of one relief load contributing to a shared disposal (flare or vent) network.
    ReliefPhase
    Physical phase of the relieving stream for a relief scenario.
    ReliefScenario
    Immutable description of a single credible overpressure relief scenario for a protected item.
    ReliefScenario.Builder
    Builder for ReliefScenario.
    TubeRuptureRelief
    Calculates the relief load from heat-exchanger tube rupture per TR3001 section 4.8.6.2 (SR-26616) and API STD 521 section 4.4.14.
